queries.query: SELECT CONCAT('$', ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(grand_total), 0), 2)) as value, 'monetization_on' as icon, 'green' as iconColor, 'Total Revenue' as title FROM orders_t UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('$', ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(grand_total), 0), 2)) as value, 'shopping_bag' as icon, 'blue' as iconColor, 'Avg Order Value' as title FROM orders_t UNION ALL SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as value, 'shopping_cart' as icon, 'orange' as iconColor, 'Total Orders' as title FROM orders_t

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as categoryValue, 'Revenue' as seriesValue, SUM(grand_total) as dataValue FROM orders_t GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY categoryValue ASC
SELECT COALESCE(payment_method, 'Not Specified') as categoryValue, 'Orders' as seriesValue, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) as dataValue FROM orders_t GROUP BY payment_method

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m') as categoryValue, 'New Customers' as seriesValue, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) as dataValue FROM users_t WHERE user_type = 'CUSTOMER' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY categoryValue ASC

SELECT u.first_name as customerName, u.email as customerEmail, COUNT(o.id) as totalOrders, SUM(o.grand_total) as totalSpent FROM orders_t o JOIN users_t u ON o.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.first_name, u.email ORDER BY totalSpent DESC
SELECT COALESCE(state_code, 'Unknown') as categoryValue, 'Customers' as seriesValue, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) as dataValue FROM users_t WHERE user_type = 'CUSTOMER' GROUP BY state_code

SELECT p.product_name as productName, SUM(oi.quantity) as totalQty, SUM(oi.row_total) as totalRevenue FROM order_items_t oi JOIN products_t p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.product_name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
SELECT COALESCE(category_id, 'Uncategorized') as categoryValue, 'Products' as seriesValue, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) as dataValue FROM products_t GROUP BY category_id
SELECT status as categoryValue, 'Orders' as seriesValue, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) as dataValue FROM orders_t GROUP BY status
SELECT order_number as orderNumber, grand_total as grandTotal, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as orderDate FROM orders_t ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT p.product_name as productName, i.quantity_on_hand as qtyOnHand, i.reorder_level as reorderLevel FROM inventory_t i JOIN products_t p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.quantity_on_hand <= i.reorder_level

SELECT p.product_name as productName, sl.change_amount as changeAmt, sl.reason as reason, DATE_FORMAT(sl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as logDate FROM stock_logs_t sl JOIN products_t p ON sl.product_id = p.id ORDER BY sl.id DESC

SELECT p.product_name as productName, d.discount_type as discountType, d.value as val, d.starts_at as startDate, d.ends_at as endDate FROM discounts_t d JOIN products_t p ON d.product_id = p.id ORDER BY d.id DESC

SELECT p.product_name as productName, ROUND(AVG(pr.rating), 1) as avgRating, COUNT(pr.id) as reviewCount FROM product_reviews_t pr JOIN products_t p ON pr.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.product_name ORDER BY avgRating DESC
SELECT p.product_name as productName, pr.rating as stars, pr.review_title as title, pr.review_text as text FROM product_reviews_t pr JOIN products_t p ON pr.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pr.id DESC

SELECT p.product_name as productName, CAST(SUM(ci.quantity) AS DOUBLE) as timesAdded FROM cart_item_t ci JOIN products_t p ON ci.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.product_name ORDER BY timesAdded DESC

SELECT u.first_name as customerName, u.email as customerEmail, COUNT(ci.id) as itemsCount FROM cart_t c JOIN users_t u ON c.user_id = u.id JOIN cart_item_t ci ON c.id = ci.cart_id LEFT JOIN orders_t o ON o.user_id = u.id AND DATE(o.created_date) >= DATE(c.created_date) WHERE o.id IS NULL GROUP BY u.id, u.first_name, u.email

SELECT CONCAT('$', ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(tax_amount), 0), 2)) as value, 'payments' as icon, 'green' as iconColor, 'Total Tax Collected' as title FROM orders_t UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT('$', ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(cgst_amount), 0), 2)) as value, 'account_balance' as icon, 'blue' as iconColor, 'Total CGST Collected' as title FROM order_items_t

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as value, 'mail' as icon, 'blue' as iconColor, 'Total Inquiries' as title FROM contact_inquiries_t UNION ALL SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'NEW' THEN 1 END) AS CHAR) as value, 'mark_email_unread' as icon, 'red' as iconColor, 'New Inquiries' as title FROM contact_inquiries_t
SELECT full_name as senderName, email as senderEmail, subject as subject, message as messageContent, status FROM contact_inquiries_t WHERE status = 'NEW' ORDER BY id DESC
